title: Leading scorer Baker-Mazara no longer with USC
content: Chad Baker-Mazara is no longer a member of the men's basketball program, USC announced, a day after he left the Trojans' loss to Nebraska.

title: Colorado QB Ponder dies in single-car crash at 23
content: Colorado quarterback Dominiq Ponder died early Sunday morning in a single-car crash, according to police. He was 23.

title: Reddick wins 3rd straight to make NASCAR history
content: Tyler Reddick became the first driver in NASCAR Cup Series history to win the first three races of the season with a victory Sunday at the Circuit of the Americas.

title: UConn finishes off perfect 31-0 regular season
content: No. 1 UConn completed its 11th undefeated regular season Sunday night, positioning itself nine wins from repeating as national champion.

title: Curry (knee) sidelined at least five more games
content: Warriors star Stephen Curry will sit out at least the next five games because of his persistent right knee issue, the team announced Sunday.

title: Echavarria wins Cognizant after Lowry collapse
content: Nico Echavarria, who was three shots back with three holes left, shot a 5-under 66 on Sunday to win at PGA National, finishing at 17-under 267 and beating Shane Lowry, who had two double bogeys in his final three holes.

title: Messi's first goals of season inspire big Miami rally
content: Lionel Messi scored twice in a four-goal second half, defender Telasco Segovia added a goal and two assists and defending champion Inter Miami CF rallied to beat Orlando City SC 4-2 on Sunday night.

title: Sources: Vikings to trade or cut Jones, Hargrave
content: The Vikings have informed running back Aaron Jones and defensive tackle Javon Hargrave that, barring a trade, they will be released at the start of the 2026 league year, sources told ESPN's Adam Schefter.

title: Iran federation says participation in WC in doubt
content: The president of Iran's soccer federation says he does not know if the national team can play World Cup matches in the United States following the surprise U.S. and Israeli bombardment of his country.

title: Barnwell tiers the top free agents on defense: Plenty of capable starters
content: With one week until NFL free agency, let's put defensive players into six tiers based on their potential offseason contracts.

title: First title in 40 years? Inside the Mets' winter makeover -- and what's next
content: Saying goodbye to the team's four longest-tenured players was tough. But New York is turning the page.

title: Women's Bracketology: Welcome to the top 16, Minnesota
content: Sunday's reveal put a new team in the top 16. The start of Champ Week will bring more answers as the bracket comes into focus.

title: Wyshynski's NHL trade tier rankings: Which big names could bring a Stanley Cup?
content: The playoff races have restarted, with many teams seeking to bolster their rosters for a deep run this spring.

title: How many future Hall of Famers are playing in the 2026 WBC?
content: From the locks to the long shots to those in between, we count Cooperstown candidates in this year's World Baseball Classic.

title: Kiper's top standouts from the NFL combine: 13 prospects who helped their draft stock
content: Mel Kiper Jr. picked out 13 players who caught his attention during combine workouts, including Chris Brazzell II and Dani Dennis-Sutton.

title: The curious case of Sawyer Robertson, Mike Leach's last quarterback
content: It took the former Baylor signal-caller years to get comfortable running an offense. Will he be able to make things work in the NFL?

title: Men's Bubble Watch: Ohio State improves its chances, Indiana doesn't
content: A mixed Big Ten Sunday gives bubble teams Ohio State and Indiana different outlooks on their at-large cases.

title: Heaps, Shaw lead USWNT to win over Argentina
content: Lindsey Heaps had a goal and an assist, and Jaedyn Shaw also scored to propel the United States to a sixth straight shutout victory with a 2-0 win over Argentina in the SheBelieves Cup on Sunday.

title: 'Confidence renewed': James Harden, Jose Ramirez and a fresh hope in Cleveland
content: Entering January, the Cavaliers were stuck in a play-in spot. They've since racked up the best record in the NBA and added an 11-time All-Star.

title: Takeaways: Only one surprising outcome at Elimination Chamber
content: The title matchups for WrestleMania 42 are nearly set, but there is only one pairing that we didn't see coming.

title: Four into three doesn't go: Predicting the Premier League's race for UCL spots
content: The four-way race for the three Champions League spots behind Arsenal and Man City is tight. How will it play out and who will miss out?

title: Yamal is eclipsing young Ronaldo, Messi. Are Barça too dependent on him already?
content: Lamine Yamal's goal and assist stats are streets ahead of Lionel Messi, Cristiano Ronaldo and Kylian Mbappé at the same age. But is he playing too much?

title: Your guide to the Unrivaled playoffs: Breeze and Vinyl advance to semifinals
content: The Phantom will face the Vinyl and the Mist play the Breeze in the semifinals on Monday in Brooklyn.

title: Draft guide: Rankings, tips, strategy, stats and more
content: All the rankings, projections, cheat sheets, strategy and analysis you need for the 2026 fantasy baseball season.

title: Australian Grand Prix: Does winning first race of F1's new era guarantee title?
content: Ahead of the dawn of what is arguably F1's biggest-ever rules shake-up with all-new cars and engines, just how important -- and foreshadowing -- will the Australian Grand Prix be?

title: Transfer rumors, news: Will Kane, Vinícius extend their contracts?
content: Bayern Munich want striker Harry Kane to sign a new contract, and Real Madrid want the same for Vinícius Júnior. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: US-Israel-Iran war: What’s the impact on India? Explained in 5 points
content: Ongoing US-Israel conflict with Iran is impacting India's economy, particularly through rising crude oil prices and potential trade disruptions. Policymakers are monitoring the situation, with immediate effects seen in energy costs and stock market declines. Broader consequences include inflation, current account deficit widening, and supply chain interruptions.

title: US-Iran war: Kuwait 'mistakenly' shoots down 3 American F-15s in friendly fire incident
content: Three US F-15E fighter jets crashed in Kuwait early Monday due to a friendly fire incident, according to US central command. All six crew members ejected safely and are in stable condition. The incident occurred amidst escalating regional tensions and Iranian retaliatory strikes, with Kuwait also intercepting hostile drones. The cause is under investigation.

title: PCB to fine Pakistan players PKR 50 lakhs each after T20 World Cup exit
content: The Pakistan Cricket Board (PCB) has decided to take the most bizarre of actions after the Pakistan team's average performance in the ongoing T20 World Cup.

title: OpenAI CEO: Can't speak for Pentagon, Anthropic seemed focused on specific prohibitions
content: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman believes Anthropic's stricter contract demands led to their Pentagon deal falling apart. While OpenAI secured a contract, Anthropic was labeled a national security risk. Altman highlighted OpenAI's reliance on technical safeguards over contractual prohibitions for safety in government AI use, aiming to de-escalate industry tensions.

title: US-Israel strikes in Iran: Indian national killed in attack on oil tanker off Oman coast
content: An Indian national has died after an oil tanker, the MKD VYOM, was attacked by an unmanned boat off the coast of Oman. The strike caused a fire and explosion in the vessel's engine room. This incident occurs amid heightened tensions and ongoing retaliation campaigns in the Gulf region.

title: Chandra Grahan 2026: Do's and don'ts for pregnant women during Lunar Eclipse
content: A rare lunar eclipse on March 3, 2026, coincides with Holi, a major Hindu festival. While modern science finds no harm, traditional beliefs advise pregnant women to take precautions.  Staying indoors, avoiding food and drink, and engaging in spiritual practices like chanting mantras are recommended for protection during this celestial event.

title: Iran attacks Saudi Arabia: Will Pakistan honour its defence pact?
content: Pakistan condemned Iran's strikes on Saudi Arabia and voiced firm solidarity with Riyadh. Despite a 2025 defence pact, analysts expect Islamabad to pursue diplomacy and logistical support rather than direct military involvement, due to its domestic and regional constraints. The agreement centres on conventional cooperation and explicitly excludes nuclear guarantees.

title: Intel CEO Lip-Bu Tan: I was shocked to find China's Huawei has hired engineers who can...
content: Intel CEO Lip-Bu Tan expressed shock at Huawei's 100+ CPU architects, developing alternatives to advanced chip tools and lithography. He warned China is rapidly closing the semiconductor gap through engineering and infrastructure optimization, even excelling in open-source AI. Tan urged the US against complacency, stating China could soon lead.

title: 'Rulayega kya pagle?': Sanju Samson's on-camera reply to Suryakumar Yadav goes viral - WATCH
content: Sanju Samson's spectacular unbeaten 97 powered India to a thrilling five-wicket victory over West Indies, securing a T20 World Cup 2026 semifinal spot.  His match-winning knock, the highest in an Indian T20 World Cup chase, earned him immense praise from skipper Suryakumar Yadav, highlighting Samson's crucial contribution under pressure.

title: US, Israel wipe out key Iranian leaders in attack blitz; how it may be a tactical blunder
content: The targeted killing of Iran's Supreme Leader has escalated into a regionwide conflict, with the US and Israel facing a complex reality as Iran signals continuity. This strategic gamble risks a prolonged, multi-actor war, potentially backfiring by strengthening the regime's internal cohesion and creating widespread instability.

title: Watch: Saudi Aramco oil refinery, one of the Middle East’s largest hubs, hit by Iranian drone
content: Saudi Aramco's Ras Tanura refinery facility was struck by a drone, leading to its shutdown and exacerbating global supply concerns. This incident follows attacks on vessels in the Strait of Hormuz, nearly halting oil shipments. The drone strike is part of a wider regional escalation, with other Gulf states also targeted, shocking officials with the intensity of Iran's response

title: Amazon's datacentre in UAE reports fire; company confirms one of its availability zones impacted
content: Amazon's UAE data center faced a temporary shutdown after 'objects struck' a facility, causing sparks and a fire. Firefighters cut power, impacting services like EC2 and RDS. While AWS didn't confirm a link to regional strikes, the incident disrupted operations, with restoration efforts underway.

title: ‘Burn in hell’: Escaped Iranian-Australian news host reacts to Khamenei’s death — video
content: Iranian-Australian broadcaster Rita Panahi expressed jubilation on air following reports of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei's death in US-Israeli strikes, declaring "the dictator is dead, and Iran is on the verge of being liberated." She praised President Trump's "courage" for the "Operation Epic Fury" strikes, which she believes could free millions from "brutal Islamist rule."

title: Lunar Eclipse on Holi 2026: Date, sutak time, visibility in India and significance of Chandra Grahan
content: A rare total lunar eclipse, also known as a Blood Moon, will occur on March 3, 2026, coinciding with the Holi festival. Visible in India, the eclipse will be observable for a brief period after moonrise. Astrologically, this event in Leo is considered significant, offering a chance for spiritual purification and manifestation during a 15-minute 'power window'.

title: NHL Trade Rumors: $25 million price tag fuels speculation of Leafs-Oilers blockbuster
content: The Toronto Maple Leafs are weighing serious trade interest in winger Bobby McMann as their season slips. With Edmonton leading the chase and contract talks stalled over a reported $5 million AAV ask, Toronto is carefully evaluating offers ahead of the March 6 deadline. Management is not acting out of panic but seeking meaningful return, while multiple teams monitor McMann’s availability.

title: Philadelphia 76ers vs Boston Celtics injury report: head-to-head records and team stats
content: The Philadelphia 76ers face the Boston Celtics at TD Garden on March 1, 2026, in a crucial Atlantic Division matchup. Both teams are significantly impacted by injuries, with Joel Embiid out for Philadelphia and Jayson Tatum still sidelined for Boston. This short-handed contest will heavily feature Tyrese Maxey for the 76ers and Jaylen Brown for the Celtics.

title: George Kittle’s wife Claire stuns in 49ers-red bikini after SI spotlight
content: Claire Kittle has captured offseason attention with a striking red bikini post following her Sports Illustrated Swimsuit shoot, while George Kittle faces rehab after a torn Achilles. Despite retirement speculation as he nears 33, the 49ers tight end remains determined to return, declaring his love for football and joking that his wife will decide when he is done. Together, the Kittles balance recovery, resilience, and rising visibility.

title: Stock market crash: Sensex down over 1,000 points; Iran tensions take toll
content: Stock market crash today: Nifty50 and BSE Sensex crashed in trade on Monday amidst rising Middle East tensions and global market turmoil, with impact on crude oil prices and trade in focus.

title: Iran's Natanz N-site hit: Tehran vows to rebuild facility; IAEA flags radiation risk
content: Iran's Natanz nuclear facility was reportedly targeted in recent US and Israeli military operations, according to Tehran's UN envoy. President Pezeshkian vowed to rebuild, asserting Iran's nuclear program is for civilian use, not weapons. IAEA chief Grossi expressed grave concern over potential radiological releases, urging restraint amid escalating regional tensions.

title: Middle East on edge: What does it mean for Indian oil markets?
content: Escalating Middle East tensions are significantly impacting India's oil imports, with crude prices surging due to concerns over the Strait of Hormuz. This could lead to higher inflation and increased costs for everyday products. Experts warn of potential price hikes and widening deficits, urging investors to prepare for a volatile market.

title: B-2 bombers, Tomahawk missiles, Claude & more: How US attacks on Iran unfolded in first 24 hours
content: The United States and Israel launched coordinated strikes against Iran as part of Operation Epic Fury and Operation Lion's Roar. The US deployed advanced assets including B-2 stealth bombers, LUCAS suicide drones, and AI services from Anthropic. These high-profile attacks targeted Iran's security apparatus, prioritizing imminent threats.

title: MS Dhoni turns 'umpire', dances after wide in CSK nets - WATCH
content: IPL 2026 preparations commenced in Chennai with MS Dhoni joining Ruturaj Gaikwad and the Chennai Super Kings squad for their first practice session. Dhoni's playful antics during nets brought laughter, while Gaikwad showcased sharp batting. New signings and domestic players participated as the franchise unveiled their new jersey.

title: US F-15 down in Kuwait? Iran shares video showing fighter jet engulfed in flames, pilots ejecting
content: US F-15 Fighter Jet Crash: An American F-15 fighter jet crashed in Kuwait amid escalating Middle East tensions following the killing of Iran's Supreme Leader. While Iran's state media claimed the jet was shot down, the exact cause remains unconfirmed. Both crew members reportedly survived and were handed over to Kuwaiti authorities

title: 'Matter of grave concern': PM Modi calls for dialogue and diplomacy as Middle East tensions soar
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi voiced deep concern over the escalating Middle East situation. This follows significant military action by the United States and Israel against Iran. The strikes led to the death of Iran's Supreme Leader, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei. India will work with regional nations to ensure the safety of its citizens.

title: Satellite images show damage at US Fifth Fleet naval base in Bahrain's Manama; see before-after pics
content: Iran unleashed retaliatory strikes across the Middle East, targeting key cities like Dubai and Sharjah, and Bahrain's US Fifth Fleet naval base. These actions followed the killing of Iran's Supreme Leader in a US-Israeli operation. The widespread attacks, described by Iran as defensive, have heightened regional tensions and prompted air defense activations.

title: 1970s-style oil shock loading? Crude may hit $100 if Strait of Hormuz shuts - what it means
content: Global oil markets are preparing for potential supply disruptions after US airstrikes on Iran over the weekend revived concerns that shipments through the Strait of Hormuz could be affected.

title: $50 bn trade target: India, Canada move closer to trade deal during Carney's visit
content: India and Canada aim to boost bilateral trade to $50 billion by 2030, accelerating negotiations on a Comprehensive Economic Partnership Agreement (CEPA). Leaders discussed critical minerals, uranium, and defense cooperation, with several MoUs exchanged, including those on CEPA Terms of Reference and critical mineral collaboration.

title: Mission England: Gambhir demands ‘special effort’ as India gear up for semi-final
content: Gautam Gambhir praised Sanju Samson's match-winning 97 against the West Indies, highlighting his potential. However, the focus now shifts to the T20 World Cup semi-final against a formidable England side in Mumbai. Gambhir emphasized that India will require a 'special effort' and flawless execution to overcome the unbeaten English team.

title: Protest erupts in Srinagar over Khamenei killing; tear gas used
content: Police deployed tear gas to disperse protesters in Kashmir following the reported killing of Iran's Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei. Mobile internet services were also slowed as authorities imposed restrictions across districts to maintain law and order amid demonstrations.

title: Mercedes-Benz V-Class launched at Rs 1.4 crore, takes on Vellfire
content: . Globally, the V-Class is offered with two wheelbase choices - Long at 3,200mm and Extra Long measuring 3,430mm. The Indian market gets extra long variant with the AMG line exterior package. Buyers can choose from five exterior colour options and two interior colour themes.

title: Influencer stands before temple and says, 'Give me a sign,' what happens next is hard to believe
content: A foreign travel influencer's viral video captures a monkey ringing a temple bell after she asks for a divine sign. The perfectly timed incident has sparked debate, with some seeing it as a miraculous response and others as mere coincidence.

title: Total lunar eclipse: When and where to watch the celestial event; IMD shares locations, timings
content: India will witness a spectacular total lunar eclipse on Tuesday, March 3, 2026. This deep celestial event, where the Moon fully enters Earth's shadow, will be visible across the nation. While most of India will see the latter stages at moonrise, parts of the Northeast and Andaman and Nicobar Islands will catch the end of totality.

title: Israel bombs Hezbollah targets in Beirut; Gulf nations vow to defend themselves — key points
content: A joint US-Israeli strike has killed Iran's Supreme Leader, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, igniting regional retaliation.  Israel and Hezbollah exchanged fire, while Gulf states braced for attacks.  Global markets plunged amid escalating fears of a wider conflict, with travel disruptions and stock market crashes reported across the Middle East.

title: Bronny James receives major Lakers news after win over Warriors
content: The Los Angeles Lakers recalled Bronny James from the South Bay Lakers after their win over the Golden State Warriors. The second-year guard has averaged 2.2 points in limited NBA minutes but impressed in the G League with 21.9 points per game. He will be available against the Sacramento Kings as Los Angeles pushes for playoff positioning.

title: ‘He showed his true potential’: Gambhir lauds Samson after Eden masterclass
content: Gautam Gambhir lauded Sanju Samson's unbeaten 97 against the West Indies, calling it a glimpse of his true potential. Samson's composed innings guided India to the T20 World Cup semifinals, showcasing his world-class talent and silencing past criticisms. Gambhir expressed confidence in Samson's ability to build on this match-winning performance.

title: Watch: How Iran missile slipped past interceptor rockets to strike target
content: A viral video purportedly shows an Iranian missile evading multiple interceptors over Jerusalem, raising concerns about Tehran's advanced missile capabilities. Experts suggest the missile might be Iran's Fattah system, designed for maneuverability to counter air defenses. Iran possesses a vast arsenal, increasingly focusing on precision and survivability to bolster its regional deterrence.

title: Gold price prediction: How will gold prices react this week to Middle East tensions?
content: Gold price prediction today: Rising tensions in the Middle East and developments around US, Israel and Iran are expected to keep gold prices volatile this week, says Manav Modi, Senior Analyst, Commodity Research at Motilal Oswal Financial Services Ltd.

title: ‘Poor tactics’: Key reasons behind Pakistan’s early T20 World Cup ouster
content: Pakistan's T20 World Cup journey ended prematurely due to a lack of consistency and questionable decision-making. Despite favorable conditions, the team faltered, with tactical errors and batting struggles costing them dearly. Captain Salman Ali Agha acknowledged pressure impacts their choices, while promising a review of leadership. Promising performances from Farhan and Tariq offered glimmers of hope amidst the disappointment.

title: Defence stocks surge on Middle East tensions! HAL, BEL, Paras Defence rise up to 13%
content: ​​The escalation has raised expectations of increased export opportunities and strengthened investor sentiment toward the sector. Paras Defence led the gains, climbing 13.5%. Meanwhile, HAL, BEL and Bharat Dynamics advanced by up to 3.5% on the BSE.

title: Drunk youth drags cop on Mercedes bonnet for 800m in Telangana; arrested
content: A drunk youth, booked for rash driving and attempting to murder a policeman, rammed another vehicle and sped away with the officer clinging to his car's bonnet in Gachibowli. The 24-year-old, with a BAC of 160 mg/100 ml, was eventually apprehended by the public after a dangerous chase.

title: MHA alerts states as Middle East tensions soar; internet curbs, security tightened in Kashmir
content: The Ministry of Home Affairs has alerted states to potential tensions due to the Iran conflict, urging vigilance against inflammatory religious gatherings and radical preachers. Authorities are monitoring individuals and groups to prevent unrest, with precautionary measures already implemented in Jammu and Kashmir following protests over the killing of Iran's supreme leader.

title: Taliban strike multiple military bases in Pakistan; strategic Nur Khan Airbase in Rawalpindi hit
content: Afghanistan's Air Force launched drone strikes on key Pakistani military bases, including Nur Khan Airbase and Quetta's 12th Corps HQ. This retaliatory action follows Pakistan's recent aerial incursions into Afghan territory. Both nations have engaged in escalating tit-for-tat clashes, with Pakistan claiming significant Taliban fighter casualties and Afghanistan asserting the downing of a Pakistani jet.

title: Dominiq Ponder death: Deion Sanders mourns Dominiq Ponder, Colorado QB
content: Colorado Buffaloes coach Deion Sanders paid tribute to quarterback Dominiq Ponder after his tragic death. Sanders focused on Ponder's character, calling him a born leader and one of his favorites. The coach's message highlighted faith and respect, reflecting his program's emphasis on personal growth and accountability. Ponder, a transfer, was valued for his presence within the team.

title: Missing Man's Body Found In Vegetarian Biryani Shop's Deep Freezer In Lucknow
content: A 38-year-old man, Vijay Pal, who had been missing since Saturday afternoon, was found dead on Sunday morning inside a vegetarian biryani shop in Uttar Pradesh's Lucknow, police said.

title: Saudi To Retaliate If Iran Mounts Concerted Attack On Oil Facilities: Report
content: A concerted Iranian attack on Saudi oil facilities could trigger a military response from the kingdom, a source close to the Saudi government told AFP on Monday, after drones hit an oil refinery.

title: Gas Leak At Chemical Unit In Maharashtra's Palghar, No Injuries Reported
content: Oleum (fuming sulphuric acid) gas leaked from a chemical unit located in an industrial belt in Palghar district of Maharashtra on Monday afternoon though there no immediate report of anyone getting affected by the leak, officials said.

title: Abandoned As Child, Chinese Woman Builds Fashion Brand Worth $36 Million
content: Huang eventually saw a chance in China's expanding e-commerce industry after years of hardship and even unsuccessful business ventures.

title: US, Arab Nations Slam Iran's "Unjustified" Drone, Missiles Strikes
content: The United States and six Arab nations on Monday issued a strongly worded statement condemning Iran's recent missile and drone attacks across West Asia, calling them "indiscriminate", "reckless", and a dangerous escalation.

title: Ukrainian Mafia Boss' Son Kidnapped In Indonesia, Chilling Ransom Video Surfaces
content: The son of a Ukrainian mafia boss has been allegedly kidnapped in Indonesia, and the abductors are demanding $10 million.

title: Opinion: Opinion | Gulf Confronts An Ugly Truth About Aligning With America
content: That Iran is attacking bases and other sites in the UAE, Qatar, Bahrain, Saudi Arabia - even Oman - has caused disillusionment in these countries, which thought that they were protected by the US but are slowly realising they're not.

title: US Confirms 3 F-15 Jets Shot Down By Kuwaiti Air Defences. Read Full Statement
content: US Central Command confirmed that three US F15E 'Strike Eagles'were shot down in separate 'friendly fire' incidents by Kuwaiti air defences.The fighter jets were "mistakenly shot down" by Kuwaiti forces, the US said.

title: AIADMK Within DMK? OPS Entry Rekindles Debate Over Political 'Homecomings'
content: In the thick of election season, the entry of expelled AIADMK leader and former chief minister O Panneerselvam into the ruling DMK has triggered a familiar political question in Tamil Nadu: is there now an "AIADMK within the DMK"?

title: Satellite Pic Shows Smoke Rising From US 5th Fleet Base In Bahrain
content: Iran launched retaliatory missiles and drones targeting Israel and nearby Arab Gulf countries hosting US forces, three days after the US-Israel joint strike began.

title: Man Praises His Watch During Yatra, Himanta Sarma Gives It To Him
content: A series of personal moments involving Assam Chief Minister Himanta Biswa Sarma are coming up as the BJP's Jana Ashirwad Yatra moves through various constituencies.

title: Iran Claims Its Nuclear Facility Hit By US-Israel, Watchdog Says Not True
content: No nuclear sites in Iran were hit in the airstrikes by the US and Israel, the UN's nuclear watchdog, the International Atomic Energy Agency, has said. Tehran, however, has claimed one site suffered damage

title: Netanyahu's Office Targeted In "Surprise Missile Attacks," Claims Iran
content: The Islamic Revolutionary Guards Corps - which reported to Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, Iran's supreme leader who was killed in the US-Israeli attacks on Saturday - said today it targeted Israel premier Benjamin Netanyahu's office in Tel Aviv.

title: Iran's Ancient Religious Landscape Before Islam
content: Long before Islam and even before Zoroastrianism, Iranian tribes followed an ancient Indo-Iranian religion

title: On Day 2 Of Yatra, Himanta Biswa Sarma Gets 'Bulldozer Salute'
content: The chief minister said the salute represents the government's continued commitment toward land reclamation drives.

title: "Cannot Go Unanswered": Qatar Flags Iran Attack Targeted Civilian Infra
content: Iran targeted civilian infrastructure such as its airport, and such attacks cannot remain unanswered, the Qatari foreign ministry has said, stressing that Doha is not engaging with Tehran diplomatically at this point

title: Top Intelligence Officials Killed In Saturday's Strikes On Iran: Israel
content: Several senior Iranian intelligence officers were killed on the opening day of the joint strikes by the US and Israel on Saturday, the Israeli Air Force (IAF) said in a statement.

title: Provident Fund Body EPFO Retains 8.25% Interest For 2025-26
content: Retirement fund body EPFO on Monday fixed the interest rate on employees' provident fund (EPF) deposits for 2025-26 at 8.25 per cent, retaining the rate for the second consecutive year, a source said.

title: Saudi Arabia Denies Reports It Lobbied Trump To Attack Iran
content: Saudi Arabia on Monday underscored that it has been consistent in "supporting diplomatic efforts" to reach a dead with Iran, disputing media reports that the wide-ranging attack on Iran was a weeks-long lobbying effort by the country.

title: Saudi Aramco Shuts Ras Tanura Refinery After Iran's Drone Attacks
content: Saudi Aramco halted operations at its Ras Tanura refinery after the facility was hit by a drone on Monday.

title: Police personnel, others take part in marathons in Belagavi, Vijayapura
content: The runs were organised to give three messages to society: Health for all, Drug-free Karnataka and Our Police, Our Pride

title: Media campaign and enforcement drive in Karnataka shows reduction in average vehicle speeds and fatalities
content: The average vehicle speeds in Bengaluru city declined by 9.4 kmph, falling from 45.91 kmph before the campaign to 36.56 kmph after its implementation

title: Doctors in Delhi save vision of Iraq patient with rare tumour
content: Doctors at the Max Super Specialty Hospital, Saket, New Delhi used an indigenously developed Ruthenium-106 plaque manufactured by the Bhabha Atomic Research Centre, enabling access to high quality treatment at significantly lower cost

title: World leaders must act before further disaster: Former Karnataka CM Bommai
content: The former Karnataka CM expressed deep concern over the escalating conflict and said while Israel has launched attacks on Iran, Iran is retaliating, creating a “highly alarming situation.”

content: TDB president K. Jayakumar told a press conference that the resolution would serve as the basis for the affidavit the Board would file with the Supreme Court when the justices meet to review the 2019 order on April 14

content: Over 100 of them turned away from airport just ahead of check in. Urge TS and AP Governments to bring them back at the earliest

title: Achievements of Indian space programme brought changes in lives of common people, says former ISRO chairman
content: Speaking about advancements in artificial intelligence and machine learning, ex-ISRO chairman A. S. Kiran Kumar says we need to consider whether we are losing our capacity to think by putting intelligence into machines as well

title: Rising oral cancer burden in T.N. highlights urgent need for awareness, early detection
content: Oral cavity cancer is largely preventable: visual inspection-based opportunistic screening and tobacco cessation programmes have proven effective for early detection, yet implementation faces persistent challenges: weak enforcement of gutka bans, cultural acceptance of chewing, and under-utilisation of screening in primary care, say doctors

title: Gangster Vikki Tyagi's son, aide held after encounter in Muzaffarnagar, arms seized: Police
content: The police claimed that Rakshit Tyagi was active in supplying illegal arms and was wanted in more than 10 criminal cases

title: KSIC filature factory at T Narasipura near Mysuru will not be shut down, clarifies Karnataka Minister

content: Notably, Kerala University, ranked fifth nationally in the National Institutional Ranking Framework (NIRF) and second under KIRF last year, did not take part in the ranking process this year

content: She was admitted at the Amrita Hospital here on December 25, 2025 after undergoing treatment at the Government Medical College Hospital, Thiruvananthapuram following the incident on November 2, 2025

content: Leading the performance was thavil exponent and Padma Shri awardee Kongapattu A.V. Murugaian. He was joined by magudam players Ganesamurthy and Daniel Jebaselvan, and thappu player P. Kalaivanan and his brother P. Mutharasan

title: 1 in 4 Indian breast cancer patients carry inherited genetic risk variants, outside known genes: study
content: Findings of the study, conducted by the IIT-M and Karkinos Healthcare, along with Kumaran Hospital, Chennai, and the Chennai Breast Centre, were published in the journal BMC Cancer

title: Himachal CM Sukhu seeks special financial package from Centre
content: Himachal Pradesh Chief Minister Sukhvinder Singh Sukhu claims discontinuation of Revenue Deficit Grant (RDG) to have a far-reaching adverse impact on State’s financial health.

title: Israel-Iran conflict: Disruption of West Asia flights via Kochi airport enters third day; taxi drivers bear brunt of cancellations
content: Except for a handful of operations to Muscat in Oman, most outbound and inbound services to destinations across the Gulf continued to be cancelled until the early hours of Tuesday

title: Independent international audit of Polavaram demanded
content: Describing Polavaram as lifeline of Andhra Pradesh a civil society organisation warned that continued engineering violations could endanger downstream population

title: Hyderabad and Nalgonda to witness brief final phase of total lunar eclipse on March 3; moonrise expected at 6.22 p.m.
content: A lunar eclipse occurs on a full moon day when the Earth moves between the sun and the moon, causing the Earth’s shadow to fall on the lunar surface

title: A metaverse for ‘Tamizh Thatha’: Rebuilding U Ve Sa’s legacy for the digital age
content: How Deepak Swaminathan, the great-great-grandson of U Ve Swaminatha Iyer, is looking to take his Tamil works to the global arena

title: Supreme Court takes cognisance of trial court relying on AI-generated 'fake' verdicts
content: The Bench said it will examine the matter in detail and issued a notice to Attorney General Venkataramani, Solicitor General Tushar Mehta and the Bar Council of India

title: Indians stuck in West Asia contact relatives in Karnataka, share videos of missile attacks, seek help to return home
content: One of them is Mamata Rayareddy, daughter of Basavaraj Rayareddy, MLA and financial advisor to Karnataka Chief Minister Siddaramaiah, who is stuck in Dubai, UAE

title: NDA constituents don’t know who heads the alliance in T.N., remarks CM Stalin
content: Referring to the NDA’s public meeting in Madurai on Sunday (March 1), Mr. Stalin pointed out that while AIADMK general secretary Edappadi K. Palaniswami had expressed hope that the alliance headed by his party would win, Prime Minister Narendra Modi wanted to install an “NDA government” in the State

title: Kerala CM Pinarayi Vijayan slams Congress govt in Telangana over demolition drive in Khammam
content: Pinarayi demands a reply from Congress leadership in Kerala over evictions in Velugumatla village. CM says Telangana government has ‘besmirched’ the legacy of Acharya Vinoba Bhave, leader of Bhoodan Movement

title: EPFO retains 8.25% interest rate on employees’ provident fund deposits for 2025-26
content: The Employees' Provident Fund Organisation (EPFO), in 2024, increased the interest rate marginally to 8.25% for 2023-24, from 8.15% in 2022-23

title: Padianallur residents demand parks and playgrounds on poramboke lands
content: With more than 48,000 people residing in the 4.52-sq. km locality, Padianallur is expected to continue to grow and develop into a denser residential area in the next few years

title: DMK sets March 3 deadline for Congress on seat-sharing talks
content: The ruling party has set the deadline as it has to finalise before March 5, the nominees for the biennial elections to the Rajya Sabha slated for March 16

title: Haryana CM Nayab Singh Saini presents ₹2.23-lakh cr Budget for 2026-27
content: Nayab Singh Saini, who also holds the Finance portfolio, said 5,000 suggestions were received from various quarters, and these have been incorporated in the Budget

title: Israel-Iran conflict: As war intensifies, Keralite expatriates in Gulf face anxiety over limited shelter facilities
content: Kerala government’s NoRKA-Roots agency has reportedly received over 600 complaints related to air traffic suspensions and limited bomb shelters

title: Symbolic political critique: Delhi court grants bail to 9 IYC workers in AI summit protest case
content: Opposing the bail pleas, Delhi Police submitted that the Constitution grants the right to peaceful protest, but there are also certain conditions

title: 4.18 lakh students set to appear for SSLC, 4.52 lakh for Plus Two exams in Kerala
content: SSLC exams begin on March 5 and Plus Two exams on March 6. Minister V. Sivankutty says SSLC results will be announced by third week of May and Plus Two results expected on May 22

title: Rajya Sabha polls: No deadlock in MVA talks; lone seat should go to Sena UBT, says Aaditya Thackeray
content: The Rajya Sabha polls for the seven seats in Maharashtra will be held on March 16, 2026 and votes will be counted on the same day

title: Andhra Pradesh Government initiates measures to ensure safe return of Telugu people stranded in Gulf Nations
content: “State Government is closely monitoring the evolving situation, particularly after reported disruptions at certain international airports that have caused inconvenience to passengers,” says Minister for NRI Empowerment Affairs

title: ‘Vishwanath & Sons’: Suriya-Venky Atluri film gets a title
content: Suriya’s latest film with director Venky Atluri has been officially titled ‘Vishwanath & Sons’, and the first-look poster gives nostalgic vibes with Suriya and a child sharing the spotlight

title: Israel-Iran conflict: Keralite expatriates in Gulf face heightened anxiety and fear amid escalating tensions in West Asia
content: The situation not only affects those abroad but also worries families in Kerala, who are concerned for their loved ones amidst the regional conflict

title: Girl administered injection at medical store in UP's Gorakhpur, dies
content: “The incident took place on March 1 evening. The deceased, Divya, a resident of Masuriya village under the Bansgaon police station area, was suffering from a mild cough and fever,” says police

title: India, Canada seal landmark uranium deal; set $50 billion trade target
content: Narendra Modi and Mark Carney discussed the precarious security situation in West Asia, with Mr. Modi asserting that India supports resolution of all conflicts through dialogue and diplomacy

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election: VCK seeks 12 seats as starting point in talks with DMK
content: Speaking to reporters at Anna Arivalayam after holding seat-sharing talks with the ruling party, Mr. Thirumavalavan expressed confidence that the Congress will remain in the DMK-led alliance

title: 24x7 Control Room numbers for Telangana residents in affected regions of West Asia
content: The Government has already received calls from the people in the affected countries and family members.

title: Ajit Pawar's son shares video alleging VSR Ventures owner slept in pilot’s seat; demands arrest
content: Jay Pawar also demanded that all aircraft of VSR Ventures be grounded till the inquiry into his father's plane crash is completed

title: Two schools get bomb threat emails in Punjab's Jalandhar
content: Police, fire brigade officials, bomb squads, dog squads and ambulances were rushed to the school premises

title: Israel-Iran conflict: Kerala postpones SSLC, Plus 2 examinations in West Asia region
content: SSLC exams to be conducted on March 5 and higher secondary examinations to be held on March 5, 6, and 7 have been postponed. New dates to be announced later, says Kerala’s Minister for General Education V. Sivankutty

title: Nagpur factory blast: Nine directors of explosives company arrested
content: Chief Minister Devendra Fadnavis has ordered a thorough investigation into the cause of the explosion

title: Iran-Israel conflict: 24 flights cancelled at Bengaluru airport
content: The key sectors to which flight service were affected include: Abu Dhabi, Riyadh, Jeddah, Dammam, Dubai and Doha.

title: Ex-parliamentarian and academician Janardan Waghmare dies
content: He was a close aide to NCP founder Sharad Pawar and had been widely acknowledged for his lifelong contribution to education, literature and public service

title: 109 persons from Karnataka stranded in West Asia as airspace closure disrupts flights
content: Relief Commissioner and Principal Secretary to the Revenue Department (Disaster Management) Munish Moudgil has urged people from Karnataka residing in the affected countries to strictly follow local advisories, contact Indian missions, and register on the Sarthi Sahayata portal

title: Panic, anger ripple across Matua belt as SIR deletions reopen citizenship faultlines before Bengal polls
content: In Thakurnagar, the Matua sect's spiritual headquarters, residents possess Aadhaar, ration and voter cards but many fear these could be rendered meaningless as many availed these documents illegally and now their names have been deleted from the rolls

title: Three schools in Delhi receive bomb threat; security check underway
content: In a message to parents, Sardar Patel Vidyalaya informed parents that students have been evacuated safely

title: ‘Manjummel Boys’ director Chidambaram booked for sexual harassment following actor’s complaint
content: Complainant has accused the director of sexually misbehaving with her reportedly at an apartment in Kochi in 2022

title: Janawadi Mahila Sanghatane to stage protest at Freedom Park in Bengaluru on March 5 over policies impacting women, farmers, labourers and senior citizens
content: Highlighting the growing burden of microfinance loans, the activists said women borrowers were often trapped in debt at interest rates as high as 25-30%, leading to harassment, sexual exploitation, and suicide

title: Amazon India slashes seller referral fees in retail growth push
content: Amazon said in December that it would invest ⁠more than $35 billion in India by 2030, looking to expand its AI infrastructure

title: Odisha Police declare 2 more districts Maoist-free
content: The 15 Maoists surrendered at a function held in Chhattisgarh's Mahasamund district, which borders Bargarh. Three senior Odisha Police officers were present at the event

title: Airtel, Google partner to check spam in messages
content: Sameer Samat, President, Android Ecosystem at Google, said that brands leveraging the messaging service for enterprise communications will be able to foster trust amongst their customers

title: ‘Special Intensive Revision is turning millions of voters into outsiders in their own country’
content: Two events organised in Kalaburagi to create awareness about Special Intensive Revision and its impact on voters

title: Kerala’s people’s plan campaign: key lessons and the road ahead
content: The foremost goal of the People’s Plan Campaign (PPC) in Kerala is to deepen democracy by empowering the Local Governments (LGs) and expanding the space for citizen’s participation in governance.

title: Madhya Pradesh CM Yadav releases gharials, turtles at Kuno National Park
content: Nine cheetahs airlifted from Botswana were released into the national park on Saturday, taking their number to 48

title: Will leverage tech to crack down on market manipulators, says SEBI chief
content: SEBI Chairman Tuhin Kanta Pandey says the market regulator is using AI to reach out to more investors for awareness; he urges people to use tools such as SEBI Check to deter fraudsters and warns against financial influencers promising astronomical returns; he says SEBI will make sure there is no instability in the markets

title: PM Modi speaks with Netanyahu to discuss current regional situation in West Asia
content: PM Modi reiterated the need for an end of hostilities in West Asia following the U.S.-Israeli joint attack on Iran

title: Chief Minister to inaugurate Critical Care Block in Jawadhu Hills
content: Health officials said that the new single-storey facility, which will cover around 5,000 sq.ft, has 50 beds with separate wards for maternity, newborn care, and in-patients

title: ‘Work with courage, take risks, face probe agencies’: Sisodia rallies AAP cadre
content: Give blood, sweat to remove Modi, instal Kejriwal as PM, says party leader; AAP rule delivered no development: BJP; both parties complicit, says Cong. after being denied permission to stage stir

title: Killing of Khamenei and attack on Iran signal the revival of regime-change doctrine and coercive unilateralism: Kharge
content: The Congress president stresses targeted killing of a sitting head of state strikes at the heart of international rules; sovereignty is not conditional, and political legitimacy cannot be manufactured through force, he asserts.

title: From the valley to the pinnacle of domestic cricket — the J & K story
content: Jammu & Kashmir’s stellar run is a tale of grit, determination and meticulous preparation; it had all bases covered and every member of the squad put his hand up when it mattered most; the next challenge for Dogra’s men will be to sustain the momentum and stay at the summit

title: ‘India stands in solidarity’: PM Modi speaks to UAE President, condemns attacks on Gulf nation
content: PM Modi also thanked the UAE President for taking care of the Indian community living in the Gulf nation, and said New Delhi supports de-escalation, regional peace, security and stability

title: A map to guide you to places in Bengaluru where pink Tabebuia are in full bloom
content: The bloom-tracking system works through a community-driven model supported by two data sources: GBA’s census data and user contributions

title: Fire breaks out at Nellore GGH, no casualties reported
content: Short-circuit in maternity ward triggers blaze; patients shifted to other blocks and private hospital as Collector and SP oversee relief measures

title: Indians among those injured in Iranian strikes, says UAE
content: Ongoing conflict between U.S.-Israel alliance and Iran send waves across West Asia; oil tanker with Indians among crew hit off Oman, passengers stranded as flight disruptions; 8 Indians stuck in Karachi airport after aircraft diversion over the conflict

title: Bubble watch: Where things stand as conference tourneys loom
content: six automatic bids to the NCAA tournament will be awarded to the winners of the six conference tournaments . championship games will be scheduled for March 20 and March 21 . ten more teams will earn at-large spots determined by the NPI formula .

title: 🏀 Win caps LeBron's father-daughter road trip
content: the lakers beat the Golden State Warriors 129-101 . leBron James was the first father-daughter road trip of his 23 years in the league . he said he was "good luck charm right here, 1-0" the first loss was a botched final play .

title: The four NHL teams that need a blockbuster trade before Friday's deadline
content: a handful of front offices might look at their current position in the standings, and decide it's time rebuild . Connor McDavid gave the franchise two more seasons past this one to figure it out by signing one of the most team-friendly deals in recent professional sports history .

title: Arsenal riding corner kicks to title; Chelsea red card problems continue
content: jurrin Timber's 66th-minute header gave the gunners a 2-1 win over 10-man Chelsea . all three goals came from corner kicks in a game short on open play chances . the result leaves the home side five points clear at the top of the premier league .

title: Offensive tiers: Barnwell ranks the best QBs, RBs, WRs, TEs and OL
content: bart Scott and Mike Tannenbaum disagree over which quarterback the Vikings should bring in to compete with J.J. McCarthy . free agency officially opens at 4 p.m. ET on march 11 . this week, I'll go position by position on the offensive side of the ball .
